title: Remove Chat
description: A Simple Minecraft Mod That Removes the Chat!
body:
###  A simple serverside mod that removes a Players ability to communicate through Chat!
Also removes the /msg, /tell, /w, /me & /teammsg Commands.\
A player trying to send a message in chat will recive a message from the Server telling them that the Chat has been diabled.

Supports configuration via the "/remove_chat" command.

Feel free to use this mod in your Modpack!
